title: Chapter 24
text: ABOUT THE AUTHOR TJ KLUNE is a Lambda Literary Award–winning author and a former claims examiner for an insurance company. His novels include The House in the Cerulean Sea and The Extraordinaries . Being queer himself, TJ believes it’s important—now more than ever—to have accurate, positive queer representation in stories. Visit him online at www.tjklunebooks.com , or sign up for email updates here . Instagram: @tjklunebooks Twitter: @tjklune Goodreads: T.J. Klune
